title: Abeec Beach Bucket Set - 13pc Sand & Water Play Bundle with Shovels, Molds, Bowl, Wheel, Can for Kids' Outdoor Activities
features: abeec Beach Toy Set - Sand and water bucket and accessories set for kids 18m+
This set includes a selection of accessories to support hours of sensory fun from water tables in the garden to sand play at the beach
Set includes: 1 x bucket, 1 x watering can, 1 x bowl, 1 x water wheel, 4 sand moulds, 2 x shovels, 1 x fork and 1 x sieve

Content arrives in a net bag secured with a plastic clasp; once opened keep net to store and easily transport accessories. Large holes throughout allow for water and sand to fall through to reduce mess
All accessories are made from soft, brightly coloured plastic with curved edges making them safe and suitable for kids 18 months+
description: Sand and Water Bucket Toy Set for Kids - Beach Toys for Kids - 13 pcs in total - Includes a Watering Can and Water Wheel - For playing on the beach or in the garden. The bucket and spade set includes the following: Sand Bucket, Watering Can for Kids, 4 x Sand and Water Shapes, 2 x Spade, 1 x Sieve, 1 x Fork, 1 x Bowl and 1 x Watering Wheel, all packed into a handy net. Also known as: - beach toys, beach toys for kids, water and sand table accessories, sand play, water play, water toys for toddlers, beach toys for toddlers, sand pit toys for toddlers, water toys for toddlers, sand castle kit, sand toys for kids, sand and water toys, water and sand toys, sand pit accessories, sand play toys, sand sieve, sand bucket, bucket and spade set for kids, bucket and spade, beach toys for toddlers, kids beach toys, sand pit toys, sand castle kit, buckets and spades for kids
